task_name: DIY Laparoscopic Trainer Setup and Basic Skills Practice

frame_analyses.description: Title card showing 'Practice basic laparoscopic skills at home' with MediSkillsLab branding
Demonstrating DIY trainer box construction using simple materials
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows phone placement for camera view and lighting setup

frame_analyses.description: Creating instrument ports in cardboard box using utility knife
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper port spacing and sizing for ergonomic instrument use

frame_analyses.description: Demonstrating laparoscopic view with instruments and practice objects
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows triangulation principle and depth perception challenges

frame_analyses.description: Page turning exercise for fine motor coordination
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Bilateral coordination using both instruments simultaneously

confidence_rationale: Clear instructional video showing DIY laparoscopic trainer setup and basic skills exercises. Not an actual FLS task performance.
technique_summary: Comprehensive tutorial for creating home laparoscopic training environment using common materials.

demonstrated_techniques: DIY trainer box construction with proper port placement
Phone camera setup for laparoscopic view simulation
Basic triangulation principles with wooden instruments
Depth perception training using small objects
Bilateral coordination exercises with page turning
Eye-hand coordination development through object manipulation
verbal_cues: Place holes 3-5 cm from side and 10-14 cm from each other
Use phone flash as light source
Smaller and smoother objects make it harder
common_errors_addressed: Improper port spacing leading to instrument collision
Lack of systematic progression in difficulty
